ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trading_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading event */,
  "trading_date" TEXT /* Date of the trading event */,
  "trading_time" TEXT /* Time of the trading event */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price at the start of the event */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price recorded during the event */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price at the end of the event */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price recorded during the event */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Total volume of trades during the event */,
  "prediction" INTEGER /* Prediction outcome (e.g., 1 for increase, 0 for decrease) */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of trading event (e.g., stock, forex, futures) */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the market associated with the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_events_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_days" (
  "day_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading day */,
  "trading_date" TEXT /* Date of the trading day */,
  "market_open" TEXT /* Time when the market opens */,
  "market_close" TEXT /* Time when the market closes */,
  "holiday" INTEGER /* Whether the trading day is a holiday */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("day_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trading event associated with this prediction */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted price for the next trading event */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction (0-1 scale) */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for making the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_predictions_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES trading_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading event being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for accessing the event (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES trading_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend analysis */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date for the trend period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date for the trend period */,
  "average_open" REAL /* Average open price during the period */,
  "average_close" REAL /* Average close price during the period */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., bullish, bearish) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the trend analysis (0-1 scale) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading event associated with the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price drop, price increase) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for alert triggering */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., triggered, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES trading_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market condition record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading event linked to this condition */,
  "market_sentiment" TEXT /* Market sentiment (e.g., bullish, bearish) */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the market during the event */,
  "news_impact" TEXT /* Impact of news events on the market (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_conditions_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES trading_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market */,
  "market_type" TEXT /* Type of market (e.g., stock, forex, futures) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_events" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading event linked to this news event */,
  "news_title" TEXT /* Title of the news event */,
  "news_text" TEXT /* Text of the news event */,
  "news_date" TEXT /* Date of the news event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_events_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES trading_events ("event_id")
)
